mapper.insert: insert into SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.TASK_DATA_GROUP (task_id, group_name, output_type, start_time_ms, end_time_ms, frequency_hz, target_num, status) values (#{taskId}, #{groupName}, #{outputType}, #{startTimeMs}, #{endTimeMs}, #{frequencyHz}, #{targetNum}, #{status})
mapper.update: update SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.TASK_DATA_GROUP set task_id = #{taskId}, group_name = #{groupName}, output_type = #{outputType}, start_time_ms = #{startTimeMs}, end_time_ms = #{endTimeMs}, frequency_hz = #{frequencyHz}, target_num = #{targetNum}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.TASK_DATA_GROUP where task_id = #{taskId} order by start_time_ms asc, id asc
